## Tasks Completed
- **task_user_judge_nanoclaw**: Extend LLM-as-judges peer review system to NanoClaw (already exists for Lexios)
- **lex-2-mkt-04**: [Phase 2 · Marketing] Create case study from A-to-Z Nutrition Centre — the only fully-extracted corpus document. Show before/after manual vs Lexios extraction.
- **lex-4-eng-01**: [Phase 4 · Engineering] Build multi-user organizations — team accounts with role-based access. RBAC logic exists in auth.py (4 roles). Need org management UI + invitation flow.
- **lex-4-eng-02**: [Phase 4 · Engineering] Build document library + versioning — track sheet revisions by discipline. documents table exists in schema.sql but no versioning logic.
- **lex-4-prod-02**: [Phase 4 · Product] Multi-language support — construction documents in Spanish, French, German, Arabic
